title: OOM on autovacuum of in-memory database causes problems.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, value DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.0, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('test2', NULL);
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 1 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC;
